title: lichen_lora_l2_init TOCTOU: double-init race loses idempotency
description:
File: firmware/bridge-zephyr/subsys/lichen/lora_l2.c:140-163

The init check uses atomic_get() before setting initialized, but another thread could pass the same check before the first completes setup:

Thread A: atomic_get() returns 0, proceeds
Thread B: atomic_get() returns 0, proceeds  
Thread A: generate_eui64(), sets initialized=1
Thread B: generate_eui64() overwrites eui64 with different random value

Trigger: Two threads call init() concurrently (e.g., main.c and NET_DEVICE_INIT callback).

Bad behavior: EUI-64 silently changes mid-setup; link-local address derived before/after may differ.

Fix: Use atomic_cas or hold lora_mutex across the entire init sequence.
